## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Zuplo and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and SEO efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/z2t3yCN_TLQScKYs7Mb9yj1o_tWUxPof?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content calibration articles are on the right track; focus on improving tone and adding code samples](https://fathom.video/share/z2t3yCN_TLQScKYs7Mb9yj1o_tWUxPof?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [Exploring options for inline images and diagrams to enhance content visually](https://fathom.video/share/z2t3yCN_TLQScKYs7Mb9yj1o_tWUxPof?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
  - [Implementing FAQ sections for middle/bottom funnel keywords to improve SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/z2t3yCN_TLQScKYs7Mb9yj1o_tWUxPof?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
  - [Investigating AI-optimized content tools (Scrunch AI) to inform topic selection and monitor performance](https://fathom.video/share/z2t3yCN_TLQScKYs7Mb9yj1o_tWUxPof?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Need for improved communication on link acquisition efforts and progress](https://fathom.video/share/z2t3yCN_TLQScKYs7Mb9yj1o_tWUxPof?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)

## Topics

### Content Calibration and Improvements

  - [Feedback on calibration articles was positive, with tone and content meeting expectations](https://fathom.video/share/z2t3yCN_TLQScKYs7Mb9yj1o_tWUxPof?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [Suggestions for improvement:](https://fathom.video/share/z2t3yCN_TLQScKYs7Mb9yj1o_tWUxPof?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
      - [Add more code samples to differentiate content and make it more developer-oriented](https://fathom.video/share/z2t3yCN_TLQScKYs7Mb9yj1o_tWUxPof?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
      - [Implement FAQ sections for middle/bottom funnel keywords](https://fathom.video/share/z2t3yCN_TLQScKYs7Mb9yj1o_tWUxPof?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
      - [Explore options for inline images and diagrams to break up text and improve mobile readability](https://fathom.video/share/z2t3yCN_TLQScKYs7Mb9yj1o_tWUxPof?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
  - [Team to work on tweaking articles, fixing links, and exploring in-text image options](https://fathom.video/share/z2t3yCN_TLQScKYs7Mb9yj1o_tWUxPof?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)

### SEO Strategy and Performance

  - [Discussion on balancing keyword targeting with creating shareable, high-quality content](https://fathom.video/share/z2t3yCN_TLQScKYs7Mb9yj1o_tWUxPof?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
  - [Focus on generating backlinks through niche, quality content (e.g., Ruby programming framework article)](https://fathom.video/share/z2t3yCN_TLQScKYs7Mb9yj1o_tWUxPof?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
  - [Consideration of pillar pages and branch content strategy for comprehensive coverage](https://fathom.video/share/z2t3yCN_TLQScKYs7Mb9yj1o_tWUxPof?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
  - [Early success seen in other accounts, with some achieving high rankings on high-volume terms quickly](https://fathom.video/share/z2t3yCN_TLQScKYs7Mb9yj1o_tWUxPof?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)
  - [Zuplo experiencing a slight traffic decline (280 to 270 clicks per day) possibly due to recent Google algorithm changes](https://fathom.video/share/z2t3yCN_TLQScKYs7Mb9yj1o_tWUxPof?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)

### AI-Optimized Content Tools

  - [Adrian introduced Scrunch AI, a tool for optimizing content for AI engines (e.g., Perplexity, GPT)](https://fathom.video/share/z2t3yCN_TLQScKYs7Mb9yj1o_tWUxPof?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Tool features:](https://fathom.video/share/z2t3yCN_TLQScKYs7Mb9yj1o_tWUxPof?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [Monitors website crawling by AI engines](https://fathom.video/share/z2t3yCN_TLQScKYs7Mb9yj1o_tWUxPof?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
      - [Tracks citations and mentions in AI responses](https://fathom.video/share/z2t3yCN_TLQScKYs7Mb9yj1o_tWUxPof?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)
      - [Analyzes referrer traffic from AI sources](https://fathom.video/share/z2t3yCN_TLQScKYs7Mb9yj1o_tWUxPof?tab=summary&timestamp=1491.0)
  - [Potential use case: Informing topic selection and monitoring performance in AI-driven search contexts](https://fathom.video/share/z2t3yCN_TLQScKYs7Mb9yj1o_tWUxPof?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Team to explore integrating Scrunch AI data into their topic selection process](https://fathom.video/share/z2t3yCN_TLQScKYs7Mb9yj1o_tWUxPof?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

### Link Acquisition Update

  - [Adrian expressed need for more clarity on link acquisition efforts](https://fathom.video/share/z2t3yCN_TLQScKYs7Mb9yj1o_tWUxPof?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)
  - [Kyle acknowledged communication gap and promised to improve updates on this front](https://fathom.video/share/z2t3yCN_TLQScKYs7Mb9yj1o_tWUxPof?tab=summary&timestamp=1686.0)
  - [Emphasis on the importance of boosting domain authority to compete with high-ranking competitors like Microsoft](https://fathom.video/share/z2t3yCN_TLQScKYs7Mb9yj1o_tWUxPof?tab=summary&timestamp=1696.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Revise and finalize calibration articles with suggested improvements](https://fathom.video/share/z2t3yCN_TLQScKYs7Mb9yj1o_tWUxPof?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)
  - [Explore options for inline images and diagrams to enhance content visually](https://fathom.video/share/z2t3yCN_TLQScKYs7Mb9yj1o_tWUxPof?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
  - [Implement FAQ sections for appropriate keywords](https://fathom.video/share/z2t3yCN_TLQScKYs7Mb9yj1o_tWUxPof?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
  - [Kyle to follow up with Jimmy regarding link acquisition efforts and ensure regular updates](https://fathom.video/share/z2t3yCN_TLQScKYs7Mb9yj1o_tWUxPof?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [Adrian to provide more information on Scrunch AI for potential integration into topic selection process](https://fathom.video/share/z2t3yCN_TLQScKYs7Mb9yj1o_tWUxPof?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Team to prepare 10 topic options for Adrian to review for upcoming content](https://fathom.video/share/z2t3yCN_TLQScKYs7Mb9yj1o_tWUxPof?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
